data.name: Luna Has Gone
data.detailed_description:
On their way to Earth, a commercial spaceship was hijacked by pirates. Misha managed to escape, but her best friend Luna's fate remains unknown. After the hijacking, Misha ends up in City 221 with the help of a local bar owner.

Her future now rests in your hands. Will she find her friend, or will something unexpected happen? The choice is yours.

"Luna Has Gone" features turn-based gameplay with element-based weapons. Choose them wisely against enemies that can bind and stun Misha. But be careful, her stamina is limited! Thanks to Arinya, an AI companion, the game avoids repetitive battles. The more you explore, the stronger you become.

  • Exploration focus: Luna has gone emphasizes world exploration over repetitive battles. The more Misha explores, the more she grows​

  • Resource management: Ammunition, bandages, armor—everything matters. Misha can’t fight without proper supplies, and money is just as important​

  • Skills tree: Unlock new abilities to equip stronger weapons, access new features, and grow Misha’s stats​

  • Weapons modification: Customize and upgrade weapons to better handle tougher enemies​

  • Day/Night cycles based event: Each day has 4 time phases, from Sunday to Saturday, with unique events tied to specific days

data.short_description: Luna Has Gone is an RPG inspired by PS1-era pre-rendered backgrounds, delivering a unique visual style for an RPG Maker game. The gameplay features turn-based battles with limited resources. You play as Misha, the daughter of a world-class corporation, whose goal is to find her missing friend, Luna.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
